script.title: Introduction to AI
script.narration: Artificial intelligence is transforming our world. According to OpenAI, this technology will reshape every industry.

script.title: Machine Learning Breakthroughs
script.narration: Machine learning has achieved remarkable breakthroughs. Dr. Jane Smith from Stanford University leads research in neural networks.

script.title: Future Applications
script.narration: The future of AI includes autonomous vehicles, personalized medicine, and smart cities. These innovations will impact billions of people worldwide.

script.title: Conclusion
script.narration: AI represents one of the most significant technological advances in human history. The journey has just begun.
